component.name: Lisek
component.summary: Offline API client for HTTP, GraphQL, WebSocket, and gRPC

description.p: Lisek is a free, offline desktop API client for HTTP, GraphQL, WebSocket, SSE, and gRPC. Build collections, mock local endpoints, run scripts, and keep everything on your machine — no cloud account required.

ul.li: HTTP/REST with auth, cookies, form-data, JSONPath, and cURL import/export
GraphQL queries, variables, introspection, and subscriptions
Local mock server, environments, history, and scheduled runs
Import from Postman, Insomnia, Bruno, OpenAPI, and HAR

description.p: Smarter collection search, Flatpak packaging for Flathub, and a redesigned docs site.
Linux RPM packages, Help panel, update checks, and workspace UX polish.
